# AgriHubX

> Digital farming ecosystem connecting farmers, buyers and agri-experts across Kenya and beyond. Trade crops & livestock, get weather insights, and grow smarter — all without GPS tracking.

AgriHubX is a privacy-first agricultural platform. It combines a marketplace, community, auctions, weather intelligence, an AI farming assistant (Ask Agri), and a digital farm twin for yield simulation. Built by students at St. John Tala High School.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of AgriHubX features and today's farm brief.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse and sell crops, livestock, fertilizers and equipment.
- [Community](/community): Connect with farmers, share posts and get answers.
- [Ask Agri](/ask-agri): AI-powered farming Q&A with expert escalation.
- [Services](/services): Find vets, transport, and equipment rentals.
- [Auctions](/auctions): Live livestock and produce auctions.
- [Digital Twin](/digital-twin): Simulate yields and get county-level AI advice.
- [Daily Brief](/brief): Role-specific daily farm insights.
- [Weather](/weather): Multi-source weather forecast for Kenyan counties.
- [Blog](/blog): Farmer stories, founder journey, and agricultural tips.
- [About](/about): Our mission and story.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and student internships.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Our no-GPS, no-tracking commitment.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Support](/support): Help center.
- [Press](/press): Press resources.
